name: Black Forest Ice Cream Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Golden vanilla ice cream (softened), or Burgundy cherry ice cream
1 cup Buttermilk (or Sour milk: mix 1 tablespoon vinegar with enough milk to equal 1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Firmly pack the ice cream into a foil-lined 9-inch round cake pan.
2. Cover and freeze for about 2 hours.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add eggs, coffee, buttermilk (or sour milk), oil, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes. The batter will be thin.
5. Pour the batter into greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow cooling for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and cool completely on a wire rack.
8. Place one cake layer upside down on a serving plate with the ice cream unmolded from the cake pan.
9. Place the second cake layer top side up over the ice cream layer.
10. Gently spread whipped cream on top and sides of the cake.
11. Using a decorator's tube or spoon, make a border of whipped cream around the edge of the top layer of cake.
12. Fill the center with cherry pie filling.
13. Cover and freeze for at least one hour before serving.
